manager_assessment.overall_status: 🔴 HUMAN INTERVENTION REQUIRED. Both agents independently confirmed the same bootstrapping deadlock: neither can invoke run_command autonomously in a text-response cycle. TASK-F cannot be self-executed by any agent. Separately: SaaS Coolify deploy is silently failing — SHA stuck at b0a954f despite two successful set-version triggers. Human must (1) SSH into MCP server to execute TASK-F patch + git pull + redeploy, and (2) check Coolify UI logs for tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3 and force-redeploy if needed. Agents have no further actions on these two blockers.
key_events: BOOTSTRAPPING DEADLOCK CONFIRMED: Operator and Observer both independently reported they cannot invoke run_command in a text-response cycle. The orchestrator that routes run_command IS orchestrator.js (the broken file). This is real — not non-compliance. Closing the agent-assignment loop; escalating to human.

SAAS DEPLOY SILENT FAILURE: set-version succeeded twice (4b6a8ea at 13:29:29, 143383c at 12:47:22) but live SHA remains b0a954f. Smoke tests after both runs failed. Coolify is receiving the trigger but the build is failing silently post-trigger. Human must inspect Coolify UI.
MCP CHECKOUT STALE: /repo-observer/scripts/t001-run.js missing from MCP server checkout. git pull required before T-001 can run at all. Human must execute as part of TASK-F SSH session.
TASK-E committed to repo but not confirmed live. Will be confirmed once SaaS deploy is unblocked by human.
T-001 CANNOT RUN until: (1) git pull on MCP server, (2) TASK-F patch applied, (3) MCP redeploy, (4) SaaS deploy unblocked.
